message:
fix: add #[cfg(test)] to MIGRATION_V1-V10 constants (test-only)

These legacy migration constants are only used in #[cfg(test)] code
for creating known-state databases. Adding the attribute eliminates
10 unused-constant warnings in non-test builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
